title: SFC Group is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: SFC Group is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
SFC Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Warehouse Manager at our Pune location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About SFC Group:
SFC Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SFC Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
